addons.name: Listeo Booking Plus
addons.description: Advanced booking on top of Listeo: resources, events, recurrence, multi-slot, service durations and constraints.

addons.name: PurioChat
addons.description: AI-powered semantic search and chat assistant. Lets visitors ask natural-language questions and get matched to listings.

addons.name: AI Review Highlights
addons.description: Auto-summarize reviews into key highlights using AI. Surfaces pros, cons, and trending themes on listing pages.

addons.name: Listeo Data Importer
addons.description: Import listings from Google Places and Outscraper. AI-generated descriptions, photo galleries, bulk imports.

addons.name: Listeo SMS
addons.description: SMS notifications for bookings, registrations and listing events. Twilio integration.

addons.name: Listeo Points of Interest
addons.description: Show nearby points of interest (transit, schools, restaurants) on listing detail pages using Google Maps Places.

addons.name: WP All Import — Listeo Add-on
addons.description: Map WP All Import fields to Listeo custom fields, custom taxonomies, gallery, location, prices and more.
